title: Deskit Store Cable Tidy Sleeve 2m – Flexible 10mm Cable Organizer for Cable Management – Durable Spiral Cable Wrap for Wire Protection – Protective Wire Wrap for a Safe & Clutter-Free Home – White
features: KEEP CABLES ORGANISED & SAFE: Tired of messy, tangled cables! Our cable tidy sleeve neatly bundles wires, reducing clutter and preventing trip hazards. Ideal for home, office, and entertainment setups.

FLEXIBLE & CUSTOMIZABLE DESIGN: The cable organizer is designed for easy adjustments, allowing you to branch out wires as needed. Cut it to the perfect size or use it as a cable tidy sleeve for a seamless look.

PROTECT YOUR FAMILY & PETS: Our cable tidy sleeve acts as a protective wire wrap, preventing pets from chewing on cables and keeping children from pulling on loose wires. Ensure a safer and secure cable management for your home.
EASY INSTALLATION WITH WRAPPING TOOL: No more hassle! Our kit includes a tool for effortless wrapping, making it simple to set up your cable sleeve, wire tidy, or cable management sleeve in seconds.

UNIVERSAL FIT FOR VARIOUS CABLE TYPES: Whether you need pc cable management, or a cable wrap for TV units and workstations, our cable management solution works with most wires, including power cords, HDMI, and USB.
